DEPT 305 JUDGE ALVARADO, CLERK: GREG CHUCK REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN THIS CASE WAS ASSIGNED FROM ROOM 206 FOR SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD. BRENDA KEITH APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF AND PHILIP HORNE APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AT 56 PEARL ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. WRIT ISSUED, BUT STAYED UNTIL 9?5/01 AT 11:59 P.M. WITH NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO PAY DEFT $500 BY 8/27/01 FOR RELOCATION COSTS. IF DEFT VACATES BY 8/31/01 AT 11:59 PM, PLTF TO PAY DEFT $1200 AT TIME OF SURRENDER OF KEYS, PLTF TO WAIVE AT PAST DUE RENT. EACH PARTY TO PAY OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS. PLTF & DEFT AGREE TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT OF OF POSSESSION PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY 9/5/01, HE WILL PAY PLTF $45.65 FROM 5/22/01 TO DATE OF VACATING PREMISES.
